name: System
description: Inspect this host's storage, CPU, memory, GPU utilization, accelerators, and agent usage.
keywords: Use the System building to inspect host storage, CPU, memory, GPU, accelerator, and agent usage metrics.
Review which GPU processes belong to Vibe Research sessions before scheduling heavy work.

access.label: Host metrics
access.detail: Uses the local system metrics sampler for host storage, CPU, memory, GPU, accelerator, and Vibe Research agent usage data. No extra credentials are required.

capabilities.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_PORT
capabilities.detail: Current Vibe Research server port when available.

capabilities.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_SYSTEM_DIR
capabilities.detail: Local system workspace directory for generated guides and communication state.

capabilities.name: CPU
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by System setup notes.

capabilities.name: GPU
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by System setup notes.

tools.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_PORT
tools.detail: Current Vibe Research server port when available.

tools.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_SYSTEM_DIR
tools.detail: Local system workspace directory for generated guides and communication state.

tools.name: CPU
tools.detail: Environment variable referenced by System setup notes.

tools.name: GPU
tools.detail: Environment variable referenced by System setup notes.

steps.title: Open System
steps.detail: Use the System building to inspect host storage, CPU, memory, GPU, accelerator, and agent usage metrics.

steps.title: Check GPU ownership
steps.detail: Review which GPU processes belong to Vibe Research sessions before scheduling heavy work.

agentGuide.summary: Use System when an agent needs to inspect host capacity, GPU availability, storage pressure, or local Vibe Research agent usage.
useCases: Check GPU utilization and ownership before starting heavy experiments.
Review CPU, memory, storage, and accelerator inventory for the local machine.
Inspect recent system metric history when diagnosing host pressure.

commands.label: Read current metrics
commands.detail: Shows current storage, CPU, memory, GPU, accelerator, and agent usage metrics.

commands.label: Read one-hour history
commands.detail: Shows the sampled history backing the System charts.

env.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_PORT
env.detail: Current Vibe Research server port when available.

env.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_SYSTEM_DIR
env.detail: Local system workspace directory for generated guides and communication state.
